backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend canister placeholder with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—'Project Manager' and 'Location Contact' input fields—to their relevant source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the daily field report app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS defining OKLCH-based light and dark theme CSS variables for shadcn-style design tokens including colors, radius, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads Inter and Oswald fonts from Google Fonts and jsPDF 2.5.1 via CDN, then mounts the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering a sticky header, feature submenu banner, the ReportForm, and a footer with a dynamic copyright year.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: Main daily field report form component with localStorage persistence, signature canvas, photo uploads, and fields including projectManager and locationContact, which are passed to the PDF generator.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module confirming no backend queries are needed since the app operates fully client-side.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS with a dark industrial OKLCH color palette, safety yellow/orange accent tokens, dark-themed button component classes, and signature container utility.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Defines the ReportData interface and a generatePDF function that uses jsPDF (loaded via CDN) to produce a formatted letter-size PDF report with sections for project info, personnel, work details, status, notes, signature, and site photos.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with CSS-variable-based colors, custom fonts (Inter, Oswald, JetBrains Mono), border radii, glow box shadows, and animations, plus the animate, typography, and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 3) for a construction/project management Field Report App, recording two existing features (Project Manager and Location Contact fields) and two pending feature requests to add those same fields.
